hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional American plumber working on a sewer line cleanout or septic access in a Sandy Springs-area suburban yard, clean work uniform, tools visible, photorealistic, no text or logos, no signage, warm natural daylight.
hero.caption_context: Sewer + septic is the differentiator. Hero should signal outdoor/line work or septic access — not a generic kitchen-sink plumber. Owner/tech at a real job site preferred over stock.

gallery.context: Sewer line camera scope or auger — cleanout access in yard. Caption 'Sewer — camera, cleaning, full-line repair'.
Septic tank pump, lid open, or field access — the specialty. Caption 'Septic — tank service, field repair, full install'.
Indoor drain cleaning — kitchen or bath. Caption 'Drain cleaning — kitchen, bath, whole-home'.
Water heater repair or replacement. Caption 'Water heaters — repair + replace, tank + tankless'.
Leak detection + pipe repair. Caption 'Leak detection + pipe repair — under slab, walls, fixtures'.
Owner personally or service truck. Caption names owner if surfaced — reinforces local-operator brand.

sections.context: Sandy Springs / Dunwoody / Alpharetta residential streetscape; Unsplash OK if no real photos

notes: Plumbing vertical with septic specialty. Septic capability is rare in North Fulton — photos should reflect outdoor/yard work (sewer + septic access) alongside standard indoor plumbing. Tone: trustworthy + capable, not urgent-emergency. At least 2 of 6 gallery slots should reflect the sewer/septic specialty (that's the moat).
